ddls:
CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the artist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of music the artist is associated with */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the artist was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the artist information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the album */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the artist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the album was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the album information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the track */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the track */,
  "track_number" INTEGER /* Track number within the album */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the album */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the track in seconds */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the track was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the track information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lyrics" (
  "lyric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the lyric */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the track */,
  "line_number" INTEGER /* Line number in the lyrics */,
  "line_text" TEXT /* Text of the lyric line */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the lyric was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the lyric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lyric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the genre */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the genre was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the genre was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_genres" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the track */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the genre */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moods" (
  "mood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the mood */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the mood */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the mood */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mood was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mood was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_moods" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the track */,
  "mood_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the mood */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id", "mood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g. admin, content manager) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lyric_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the report */,
  "lyric_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the lyric */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user who made the report */,
  "report_text" TEXT /* Text of the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
